Off Calendar Sep-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jocelyn M. Soriano, Esq. of ARCHER NORRIS (925-930-6600), appearing for defendant / moving party Highland Stucco
Anna Maria Costa, Esq. of LEVIN SIMES KAISER & GORNICK LLP (415-646-7160), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Allison Fish, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT HIGHLAND STUCCO AND LIME PRODUCTS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Highland Stucco and Lime Products, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. The deposition testimony and declaration of Richard Willoughby and the deposition testimony of Mr. Atkinson create a triable issue whether Paul Willoughby was exposed to asbestos-containing Highland finish coat stucco. Defendant's objections to Richard Willoughby's declaration and Mr. Atkinson's deposition testimony are overruled. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
